name: teamflow
description: Coordinate multi-agent project roles through shared team workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate PM, TL, QA, and developer agents through shared workflows.
interface.longDescription: TeamFlow 同舟 helps Codex sessions form a multi-agent project team, assign PM, TL, QA, and developer roles, connect shared project boards, and keep work moving through explicit team workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up TeamFlow for this project.
